scripts.docs:dev: pnpm run docs:generate-changelog-index && vuepress dev docs
scripts.docs:clean-dev: pnpm run docs:generate-changelog-index && vuepress dev docs --clean-cache
scripts.docs:build: pnpm run docs:generate-changelog-index && vuepress build docs
scripts.docs:check: pnpm run docs:test && pnpm run docs:check-links && pnpm run docs:check-changelog-index && pnpm run docs:build
